profile_summary: Couple traveler (mid-high budget) prioritizing spa & wellness, food & dining, beach access.

recommendations.justification: Casa Harbour, Istanbul ranks #1 for this traveler on spa & wellness (+0.92), food & dining (+0.67), beach access (+0.88), weighted by what matters most to them. Guests note: "Wonderful wellness facilities; the sauna and treatments left us completely refreshed."

supporting_evidence.quote: Wonderful wellness facilities; the sauna and treatments left us completely refreshed.
Woke up to the sea every morning — the beachfront setting was perfect.
The spa was a highlight — incredible massages and a serene relaxation pool.
